behavior_lens.sandbox.complex_desc.source: Co-occurring behaviors, environmental shifts, trend patterns

behavior_lens.sandbox.standard_desc.source: Single function, consistent setting, straightforward data

behavior_lens.sandbox.add_phase_desc.source: Generate additional data representing a new phase (e.g., after implementing an intervention). New entries will be appended to existing data with timestamps continuing forward.
behavior_lens.sandbox.add_phase_desc.uiStrings: Add a new phase with custom data points.

behavior_lens.dq.tip_add_entries.uiStrings: Add more entries to strengthen this score.

behavior_lens.dq.tip_great_volume.uiStrings: Great volume of entries for analysis.

behavior_lens.dq.tip_last_entry_ago.source: Last entry was ${Math.round(daysSince)} days ago — add fresh data
behavior_lens.dq.tip_last_entry_ago.uiStrings: Last entry was recorded a while ago.

behavior_lens.dq.tip_data_current.uiStrings: Data is current and reflects recent behavior.

behavior_lens.dq.tip_antecedent_types.source: Only ${uniqueAnt.size} antecedent type${uniqueAnt.size !== 1 ? 's' : ''} — collect across 3+ settings
behavior_lens.dq.tip_antecedent_types.uiStrings: Good range of antecedent types observed.

behavior_lens.dq.tip_missing_fields.source: ${entries.length - complete} entries are missing A, B, or C fields
behavior_lens.dq.tip_missing_fields.uiStrings: Some entries are missing required fields.

behavior_lens.dq.tip_all_complete.uiStrings: All entries have the required fields filled in.

behavior_lens.dq.tip_spread_days.source: Data from only ${uniqueDays.size} day${uniqueDays.size !== 1 ? 's' : ''} — spread across 3+ days
behavior_lens.dq.tip_spread_days.uiStrings: Entries are well spread across days.

behavior_lens.fba.step_select_student_de.source: Choose or create a student profile to begin collecting data
behavior_lens.fba.step_select_student_de.uiStrings: Choose which student this FBA is for.

behavior_lens.fba.step_collect_more_desc.source: You have ${abcEntries.length} entries — aim for 5+ across different days for reliable patterns
behavior_lens.fba.step_collect_more_desc.uiStrings: Add more observation sessions to strengthen the dataset.

behavior_lens.fba.step_ai_analysis_desc.source: You have enough data! Let AI identify behavior patterns and potential functions
behavior_lens.fba.step_ai_analysis_desc.uiStrings: Use AI to identify patterns and hypothesized function.

behavior_lens.fba.step_hypothesis_desc.source: Create a visual hypothesis diagram linking triggers, behaviors, and consequences
behavior_lens.fba.step_hypothesis_desc.uiStrings: Draft a working hypothesis of behavior function.

behavior_lens.fba.step_sessions_desc.source: Start tracking data on your intervention to measure effectiveness
behavior_lens.fba.step_sessions_desc.uiStrings: Run observation sessions across settings and times.

behavior_lens.fba.step_report_desc.source: 🎉 Full FBA cycle data collected! Create a professional progress report
behavior_lens.fba.step_report_desc.uiStrings: Generate the FBA report for the team.

behavior_lens.heatmap.subtitle.source: Incident density across the past 4 school weeks
behavior_lens.heatmap.subtitle.uiStrings: Behavior frequency by day and time

behavior_lens.ph.teaching_strategy_how_y.source: 📚 Teaching strategy (how you\'ll teach the replacement)

behavior_lens.ui.at_each_phase_you.source: At each phase you\'ll write your analysis, then receive AI evaluation with scoring and feedback.

behavior_lens.raw.bias_and_behavior.source: Bias and Behavior: Looking Inward First

behavior_lens.toast.session_saved_ns_n_t.source: Session saved! ${duration}s, ${targets.reduce((a, t) => a + t.count, 0)} total responses
behavior_lens.toast.session_saved_ns_n_t.uiStrings: Session saved! Ns, N total responses

behavior_lens.toast.enter_task_name.source: Please enter a Task/Skill Name first

behavior_lens.toast.mastered_n_n_consecu.uiStrings: 🎉 MASTERED! N — N consecutive sessions at criterion!

behavior_lens.toast.need_2_baseline_2_in.uiStrings: Need at least 2 baseline and 2 intervention entries with phase tags.

behavior_lens.toast.autofilled_from_phas.source: Auto-filled: ${baseVals.length} baseline + ${intVals.length} intervention intensity values from ABC data

behavior_lens.toast.parsed_n_abc_entries.uiStrings: Parsed N ABC entries from transcript!

behavior_lens.toast.added_n_entries_to_a.uiStrings: Added N entries to ABC data!

behavior_lens.hub.abc_desc.source: Record antecedent-behavior-consequence data for functional analysis
behavior_lens.hub.abc_desc.uiStrings: Record antecedent, behavior, and consequence observations

behavior_lens.hub.obs_desc.source: Fullscreen observation mode with frequency, duration, interval, and latency recording
behavior_lens.hub.obs_desc.uiStrings: Real-time interval, frequency, or duration recording

behavior_lens.hub.analysis_desc.source: AI-powered functional behavior analysis based on your collected data

behavior_lens.hub.overview_desc.source: Visual dashboard with trends, heatmap, and data summaries
behavior_lens.hub.overview_desc.uiStrings: Behavior trends, charts, and summary statistics

behavior_lens.hub.freq_desc.source: Quick-click tap counter for rapid in-class behavior tallying

behavior_lens.hub.interval_desc.source: Visual grid with partial, whole, and momentary recording modes
behavior_lens.hub.interval_desc.uiStrings: Partial, whole, or momentary time sampling grid

behavior_lens.hub.token_desc.source: Visual reinforcement tracker for positive behavior support
behavior_lens.hub.token_desc.uiStrings: Visual reinforcement board with customizable tokens

behavior_lens.hub.hotspot_desc.source: Map behavioral patterns to daily routine periods with AI analysis
behavior_lens.hub.hotspot_desc.uiStrings: Identify high-frequency behavior times across routines

behavior_lens.hub.export_desc.source: Download data as JSON, CSV, text reports, or printable PDF portfolio
behavior_lens.hub.export_desc.uiStrings: Download ABC data and observations as JSON or text

behavior_lens.hub.record_desc.source: Paste IEP/eval text for AI-powered structured summary

behavior_lens.hub.hypothesis_desc.source: Visual function hypothesis flow from ABC data with AI generation
behavior_lens.hub.hypothesis_desc.uiStrings: Visual A→B→C→Function flow chart with AI generation

behavior_lens.hub.goals_desc.source: Step-by-step behavioral goal construction with AI suggestions
behavior_lens.hub.goals_desc.uiStrings: AI-generated SMART behavior goals with progress tracking

behavior_lens.hub.contract_desc.source: AI-drafted contract with student and teacher sections

behavior_lens.hub.cycle_desc.source: Colvin & Sugai 7-phase emotional regulation model with personalized strategies

behavior_lens.hub.choice_desc.uiStrings: Student-facing visual choice cards for self-regulation

behavior_lens.hub.triangulation_desc.source: Cross-reference ABC, observations, and AI analysis for convergence

behavior_lens.hub.impact_desc.source: Quantify lost instructional time and estimated annual cost
behavior_lens.hub.impact_desc.uiStrings: Quantify behavior frequency, duration, and annual cost

behavior_lens.hub.crisis_desc.source: 3-tier emergency protocol with AI-drafted safety plan

behavior_lens.hub.functionquiz_desc.source: Interactive clinical scenarios to practice identifying behavioral functions via the AC model
behavior_lens.hub.functionquiz_desc.uiStrings: Practice identifying behavior function from short scenarios.

behavior_lens.hub.practicum_desc.source: Practice MTS, Partial, and Whole Interval recording against simulated scenarios with accuracy grading
behavior_lens.hub.practicum_desc.uiStrings: Run a guided practice case from start to finish.

behavior_lens.hub.bipgen_desc.source: Synthesize ABC and preference data into a formal, editable BIP document
behavior_lens.hub.bipgen_desc.uiStrings: Draft a Behavior Intervention Plan from your data.

behavior_lens.hub.competingpathways_desc.source: Visual model mapping problem, replacement, and competing behaviors for FBA/BIP planning
behavior_lens.hub.competingpathways_desc.uiStrings: Map desired and replacement behaviors against the problem path.

behavior_lens.hub.cantdowontdo_desc.source: Skill deficit vs performance deficit assessment through structured probes
behavior_lens.hub.cantdowontdo_desc.uiStrings: Sort skill vs. performance deficits to pick the right support.

behavior_lens.hub.mipractice_desc.source: Practice motivational interviewing with AI-powered student simulations
behavior_lens.hub.mipractice_desc.uiStrings: Rehearse MI conversations with simulated student responses.

behavior_lens.hub.replacementbehavior_de.source: Track teaching trials and monitor acquisition of replacement behaviors
behavior_lens.hub.replacementbehavior_de.uiStrings: Identify a same-function behavior that meets the student’s need.
